networkError.title: Network hiccup
networkError.body: Please try again in a moment.

auth.headline: Metabolise your day, gently.
auth.subhead: A calm space to notice, name and integrate what moves through you.
auth.terms: By continuing you agree to a kind, mindful use of this space.
auth.sentConfirmation: We sent a confirmation link to
auth.sentReset: We sent a reset link to
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

onboarding.bmrBody: Your Basal Metabolisation Rate reflects how well you're moving life through, not just storing it. We track gently — no scores to chase, only patterns to notice.
onboarding.narrativeBody: Each unfinished thought becomes a branch. Naming it, feeling it, integrating it — that's how it gets metabolised.
onboarding.baselineHint: starting point · no need to compare

home.emptyBody: Start with a morning check-in to set today's tone.

morning.title: MORNING
morning.subhead: Speak freely. Nothing to fix yet — only to notice.
morning.textareaPlaceholder: A meeting I'm anxious about, a friend I haven't called, the run I keep postponing…
morning.paywallFeature: AI refinement is part of Plus
morning.paywallDesc: Plus rephrases your raw words into gentle, named branches you can carry into the day.

evening.title: EVENING
evening.emptyDesc: A morning check-in is a quiet place to notice what's open.
evening.allDoneDesc: Rest well — your BMR closed at {{bmr}}.
evening.howFully: How fully did you metabolize it?
evening.reflectionPlaceholder: One sentence on what you noticed…

library.title: LIBRARY
library.emptyBody: Branches and reflections you metabolise will gather here.

profile.title: PROFILE
profile.learnedEmpty: Nothing yet — your preferences and reminder patterns will start shaping this section as you use the app.

settings.title: SETTINGS
settings.aiModelDesc: Powers the gentle prompts and reflections

circles.title: CIRCLES
circles.emptyBody: Create one to share gently with a few trusted people.

crisis.title: CRISIS
crisis.headline: Slow down with one breath.
crisis.body: If something feels too big, this is a soft pause. Reach out to someone you trust, or local emergency support if you need help right now.

share.title: SHARED
share.notActiveBody: It may have been revoked or expired.
share.emptyList: No share links yet. New links live until you revoke or rotate them.
share.revokedBody: Anyone with the link will get a 404.
share.rotatedBody: New link copied. Old link no longer works.
share.viewerNotActiveBody: It may have been revoked or rotated to a fresh URL. Ask the person who shared it for a new link.
share.viewerExpiredBody: Ask the person who shared it for a fresh link.

legal.deletionIntro: You can request full deletion of your account and associated data. This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
legal.deletionSentBody: We'll follow up by email shortly.
legal.deletionEmailFallback: Please email support@metabyx.app from your account address.

crisisFull.title: CRISIS MODE
crisisFull.sayEyebrow: Say or write what is here
crisisFull.notePlaceholder: Nothing needs to be solved. Just name it…
crisisFull.footer: Breathing alone is enough. Stay as long as you need.

libraryFull.exportPlusTitle: Library export is part of Plus
libraryFull.exportPlusDesc: Plus lets you download the full library as JSON or PDF — Free keeps the last 14 days on-device only.
libraryFull.pdfPlusTitle: PDF export is part of Plus
libraryFull.pdfPlusDesc: Plus generates a printable PDF of your branches, BMR history, and emotion log.
libraryFull.emptyBody: Each branch you notice settles here. A morning check-in is a gentle place to begin.
libraryFull.noMatchBody: Try another word, or clear the search to see everything.

branchFull.linkCopiedBody: Paste it anywhere to revisit this branch.
branchFull.shareErrorBody: Try copying the address bar instead.
branchFull.stillOpen: This branch is still open. A guided session helps it settle.
branchFull.notFoundBody: This branch is no longer in your library.

circlesFull.paywallDesc: Small shared rooms — invite a few people in, hold one collective pulse together.
circlesFull.earlyBody: Small rooms where a few people metabolise life together — gentle rhythms, shared check-ins, one collective pulse.
circlesFull.noCirclesBody: Create one to gather a few people, or paste an invite code to join an existing room.
circlesFull.createIntro: Name your room and choose how open it is. We'll generate a private join code you can share.
circlesFull.joinIntro: Paste the invite code a friend shared. You'll be added to their room.
circlesFull.invalidCode: That invite code isn't valid or has expired.
circlesFull.inviteCodeAria: Circle invite code, formatted four characters dash four characters
circlesFull.formatHint: Format: 4 chars · dash · 4 chars · {{left}}/{{max}} attempts left

circleThread.paywallTitle: Circle threads are part of Pro
circleThread.paywallDesc: Share reflections and BMR insights inside small rooms — anonymous when you want it.
circleThread.notOnDevice: That circle isn't on this device. Open it from your Circles list.
circleThread.placeholderReflection: A few words on what you're metabolising right now…
circleThread.placeholderInsight: A BMR insight or pattern you've noticed…
circleThread.composerAria: Compose a {{kind}} for {{name}}. Cmd or Ctrl plus Enter to post.
circleThread.shareOff: Progress sharing is off in your prefs
circleThread.letCirclesSee: Let circles see my progress when I share it
circleThread.noPostsYet: No posts yet. Be the first to drop a reflection.

emotion.closeStrongSad: Let it feel heavy as you write — the new truth isn't smaller because of it.
emotion.closeSoftSad: You don't have to comfort the grief to move forward. Write the gentle, true thing.
emotion.closeStrongAnx: Breath first, then words. The new sentence can come quietly.
emotion.closeSoftAnx: Write something a little safer than the fear — half a step is enough.
emotion.closeAnger: The anger has said its piece. Let the new language be warm, not pretty.
emotion.closeGuilt: You may speak to yourself as to someone you love.
emotion.closeHope: The new story has already begun. Write it in your own time.
emotion.closeTenderness: Hold the tenderness as you write. It will be a good place to land.
emotion.closeSoftDefault: A calm sentence is enough. You don't need to polish it.
emotion.closeStrongDefault: Write what will rest in you tonight.
emotion.idStrongSad: There's a lot here. You don't need to solve anything now — just see it.
emotion.idSoftSad: Grief may stay. It belongs in the process.
emotion.idStrongAnx: Your breath can set the pace. We have plenty of time.
emotion.idSoftAnx: It's safe just to name it — no demands, no solution yet.
emotion.idAnger: The anger points to something important. We metabolise it together, slowly.
emotion.idGuilt: You meet yourself gently here. Shame does not get the last word.
emotion.idHope: Hope counts as data too. It may come along.
emotion.idRelief: The relief is saying something true. Notice where it sits in your body.
emotion.idTenderness: Tenderness is a good compass needle for the rest of the session.
emotion.idSoftDefault: Nothing needs to be big. Just notice what's there.
emotion.idStrongDefault: Good that you put words to it. We move on at your pace.

subscriptionHistory.empty: No subscription events yet. Upgrades, downgrades, and cancellations will show up here.

identify.subtitle: Begin where the branch lives in language. One sentence is enough.
identify.placeholder: What if I'm not ready for the conversation tomorrow…

friction.subtitle: Tap what you notice. Nothing more to do than name it.
friction.placeholder: A short word for what's underneath…
friction.recordAria: Record what you notice in body and mind

paths.defaultIntro: Read each slowly. Choose the one your body leans toward.
paths.errorFallback: Could not reach guidance — choose any path that draws you.
paths.aiFeature: AI-guided paths are part of Plus
paths.aiDescription: Plus tailors the three counterfactual paths to your branch — Free shows preset paths only.

action.title: Take an action
action.blurb: A small concrete move that loosens the branch.
action.g1: Name the smallest possible next step — under 2 minutes.
action.g2: Do it now, or place it on tomorrow's calendar with a time.
action.g3: Notice the relief of moving, not the size of the move.

story.title: Write a new story
story.blurb: Re-author the meaning so the branch can settle.
story.g1: Find the old sentence you've been telling yourself.
story.g2: Rewrite it in a kinder, truer voice.
story.g3: Read the new sentence aloud, slowly, three times.

symbolic.title: Symbolic gesture
symbolic.blurb: An embodied act that marks the shift.
symbolic.g1: Choose a small symbol — a candle, a stone, an exhale.
symbolic.g2: Hold or perform it while naming what you release.
symbolic.g3: Let the gesture stand in for the work, then return.

prayer.title: Reflection or prayer
prayer.blurb: Hand the branch to something larger than yourself.
prayer.g1: Sit still. Take three slow breaths through the nose.
prayer.g2: Offer the branch up in your own words.
prayer.g3: Listen — without expectation — for one quiet sentence back.

close.subtitle: One or two lines. The truer story you can hold now.
close.placeholder: I am allowed to begin gently. Tomorrow will meet me as I am…

finish.unsupportedBrowser: This browser can't play the voice-over.
finish.narrClosed: You closed it with this thought: {{thought}}
finish.narrBmr: Your metabolic rhythm today is {{bmr}}. It is held now. Rest well.

voice.statusReview: Preview and edit the text before accepting
voice.tipAccept: Tip: ⌘/Ctrl + Enter to accept, Esc to cancel.
voice.calibrateAria: Calibrate background noise by staying silent for one second
voice.silenceAria: Silence before automatic stop, in milliseconds
voice.announceLowConf: Low pitch confidence — waiting for a clearer voice
voice.announceTense: The tone is a bit tense — breathe calmly, your words still land
voice.errEmptyRec: The recording was empty. Hold longer and try again.
voice.errEmptyText: The text is empty. Record again or type instead.
voice.micDenied: Microphone access was denied. Open your browser's site settings and allow the microphone, or type the text.
voice.micNotFound: No microphone found. Connect a microphone or pick another device.
voice.micBusy: The microphone is in use by another app. Close other apps and try again.
voice.micDisconnected: The microphone was disconnected before recording started. Try again.
voice.micInsecure: Voice recording requires a secure connection (HTTPS). Open the page over HTTPS and try again.
voice.micUnknown: Could not open the microphone. Try again or type the text instead.
voice.trUnauth: Transcription service is not authorized. Please contact support.
voice.trTooLong: The recording is too long. Try a shorter recording (under 2 minutes).
voice.trUnsupported: Audio format not supported. Switch browser or type the text instead.
voice.trTooMany: Too many requests right now. Wait a moment and try again.
voice.trServerDown: The transcription service is temporarily down. Try again in a moment.
voice.trFallback: Could not transcribe the recording. Try again or type the text instead.

cue.tense: Your voice sounds a little tense
